---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] Brief description'
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what feature you're requesting.

## Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe the problem.

Example: "I'm frustrated when... because..."

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case
Why would this feature be useful? Describe the use case(s).

Example:
- As a [user type], I want to [action] so that [benefit]
- This would help with [specific scenario]

## Additional Context
Add any other context, examples, or screenshots here.

## Related
- Links to similar features or issues
- References to documentation
- Roadmap: https://github.com/Sapience-AI/openclaw-middleware-suite/blob/main/ROADMAP.md

## Checklist
- [ ] I've checked the roadmap (already planned?)
- [ ] I've verified this feature isn't already requested
- [ ] I've provided clear use case(s)
- [ ] I've considered alternatives
